message:
refactor+fix+feat: centralize capacity constants, add config sections, harden edge cases across subsystems

This commit combines several interleaved changes that touch overlapping
files (capacity_defaults imports mixed with logic fixes in the same files):

== Mechanical Refactoring ==

capacity_defaults module (NEW, ~100 files touched):
  Centralize all bounded-collection capacity constants (MAX_EVENTS=4096,
  MAX_AUDIT_LOG_ENTRIES, MAX_RECEIPTS, etc.) into a tiered hierarchy
  (base::SMALL=256, base::STANDARD=4096, base::LARGE=8192) with
  semantic groupings (audit, collections, security, runtime, verifier)
  and backwards-compatible aliases module. Every file replaces local
  const definitions with use crate::capacity_defaults::aliases::*.

schema_versions module (NEW, ~3 files):
  Catalogue all ~80 protocol schema version strings in one file with
  all_versions() diagnostic function. Migrate VERIFY_CLI_CONTRACT
  from main.rs to schema_versions module.

== Feature Work ==

Config expansion (+912 lines in config.rs):
  Add RemoteConfig, SecurityConfig, EngineConfig, ThresholdsConfig
  sections. Extend CompatibilityConfig, MigrationConfig, TrustConfig,
  ReplayConfig, FleetConfig, RuntimeConfig with new fields. Add
  builder/factory methods for idempotency_dedupe_store(),
  degraded_mode_policy(), compat_gate_evaluator(), etc.
  Wire downstream: compat_gates, compatibility_gate, degraded_mode_policy,
  verifier_economy, idempotency_store all accept config parameters.

Engine dispatcher (cli.rs, ops/engine_dispatcher.rs, lockstep_harness.rs):
  Add --engine-bin CLI flag with multi-source resolution: CLI arg >
  env FRANKEN_ENGINE_BIN > env FRANKEN_NODE_ENGINE_BINARY_PATH >
  config [engine].binary_path > auto-discovery candidates.

== Bug Fixes and Hardening ==

- anti_entropy: precedence-aware insertion rejects lower-precedence
  updates; phase 2 reconciliation tracks applied vs rejected
- mmr_proofs: full rebuild instead of incremental update; root hash
  validation on inclusion/prefix proofs
- activation_pipeline: upfront secret_refs.len() > MAX validation
- lease_conflict: strict < instead of <= for prefer_earliest;
  skip prefer_earliest when timestamps equal
- checkpoint: constant-time ct_eq for previous_checkpoint_hash
- hardware_planner: defensive if-let instead of expect()
- root_pointer: proper error handling instead of unwrap()
- middleware: saturating_duration_since() prevents clock regression panic
- receipt_chain: next_checkpoint_id prevents ID reuse after eviction
- extension_registry: handles missing witness on rejected admission
- quarantine: merged nested if-let into single chain
- verifier_toolkit: require all threshold keys have matching metrics;
  dynamic current_year_base() instead of hardcoded 2025
- dpor_exploration: extracted MAX_MATERIALIZED_SCHEDULES constant
- scripts: fix check paths for lib.rs and ownership violations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -392,6 +392,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "franken-decision",
  "franken-evidence",
  "franken-kernel",
+ "frankenengine-extension-host",
  "hex",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",

@@ -195,6 +195,8 @@ profile = "balanced"
 mode = "balanced"
 # Divergence receipts are always recorded in production profiles
 emit_divergence_receipts = true
+# TTL for signed compatibility receipts
+default_receipt_ttl_secs = 3600
 
 [migration]
 # Enable automatic rewrite suggestions
@@ -214,6 +216,8 @@ quarantine_on_high_risk = true
 persist_high_severity = true
 # Deterministic bundle export format version
 bundle_version = "v1"
+# Maximum permitted replay capsule freshness window
+max_replay_capsule_freshness_secs = 3600
 
 [registry]
 # Enforce signature and provenance gates
@@ -229,6 +233,14 @@ convergence_timeout_seconds = 120
 # Stable metrics namespace for automation
 namespace = "franken_node"
 emit_structured_audit_events = true
+
+[remote]
+# Default TTL for remote idempotency entries
+idempotency_ttl_secs = 604800
+
+[security]
+# Maximum degraded-mode duration before suspension
+max_degraded_duration_secs = 3600
 ```
 
 ## Architecture

@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@ profile = "balanced"
 [compatibility]
 mode = "balanced"
 emit_divergence_receipts = true
+default_receipt_ttl_secs = 3600
 
 [migration]
 autofix = true
@@ -20,6 +21,7 @@ quarantine_on_high_risk = true
 [replay]
 persist_high_severity = true
 bundle_version = "v1"
+max_replay_capsule_freshness_secs = 3600
 
 [registry]
 require_signatures = true
@@ -33,6 +35,12 @@ convergence_timeout_seconds = 120
 namespace = "franken_node"
 emit_structured_audit_events = true
 
+[remote]
+idempotency_ttl_secs = 604800
+
+[security]
+max_degraded_duration_secs = 3600
+
 # Profile-specific overlays:
 # Use [profiles.strict], [profiles.balanced], or [profiles."legacy-risky"]

@@ -38,6 +38,8 @@ Top-level keys:
   - `[registry]`
   - `[fleet]`
   - `[observability]`
+  - `[remote]`
+  - `[security]`
 - profile overlays:
   - `[profiles.strict.*]`
   - `[profiles.balanced.*]`
@@ -52,19 +54,23 @@ Supported `FRANKEN_NODE_*` keys:
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_PROFILE`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_COMPATIBILITY_MODE`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_COMPATIBILITY_EMIT_DIVERGENCE_RECEIPTS`
+- `FRANKEN_NODE_COMPATIBILITY_DEFAULT_RECEIPT_TTL_SECS`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_MIGRATION_AUTOFIX`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_MIGRATION_REQUIRE_LOCKSTEP_VALIDATION`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_TRUST_RISKY_REQUIRES_FRESH_REVOCATION`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_TRUST_DANGEROUS_REQUIRES_FRESH_REVOCATION`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_TRUST_QUARANTINE_ON_HIGH_RISK`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_REPLAY_PERSIST_HIGH_SEVERITY`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_REPLAY_BUNDLE_VERSION`
+- `FRANKEN_NODE_REPLAY_MAX_REPLAY_CAPSULE_FRESHNESS_SECS`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_REGISTRY_REQUIRE_SIGNATURES`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_REGISTRY_REQUIRE_PROVENANCE`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_REGISTRY_MINIMUM_ASSURANCE_LEVEL`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_FLEET_CONVERGENCE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_OBSERVABILITY_NAMESPACE`
 - `FRANKEN_NODE_OBSERVABILITY_EMIT_STRUCTURED_AUDIT_EVENTS`
+- `FRANKEN_NODE_REMOTE_IDEMPOTENCY_TTL_SECS`
+- `FRANKEN_NODE_SECURITY_MAX_DEGRADED_DURATION_SECS`
 
 Boolean env values accept: `true/false/1/0/yes/no/on/off`.
 
@@ -76,8 +82,12 @@ Resolution fails with stable diagnostics when:
 - env values have invalid type encodings
 - `registry.minimum_assurance_level` is outside `[1,5]`
 - `fleet.convergence_timeout_seconds` is `0`
+- `compatibility.default_receipt_ttl_secs` is `0`
+- `replay.max_replay_capsule_freshness_secs` is `0`
 - `replay.bundle_version` is empty
 - `observability.namespace` is empty
+- `remote.idempotency_ttl_secs` is `0`
+- `security.max_degraded_duration_secs` is `0`
 
 ## Merge Provenance

@@ -523,7 +523,8 @@ def main() -> None:
     waivers = load_waivers(waiver_path)
     waiver_rules = {(w["file"], w["rule_id"]) for w in waivers}
 
-    rust_files = sorted(ROOT.rglob("crates/*/src/**/*.rs"))
+    crates_dir = ROOT / "crates"
+    rust_files = sorted(crates_dir.rglob("*/src/**/*.rs")) if crates_dir.exists() else []
 
     contract_violations = _waive(check_contract_alignment(contract_text), waiver_rules)
     registry_violations: list[dict[str, Any]] = []

@@ -87,9 +87,12 @@ def _checks() -> list:
     results.append(_check("module wired in replay/mod.rs",
                           "pub mod time_travel_engine;" in mod_src,
                           "replay/mod.rs contains pub mod time_travel_engine"))
-    results.append(_check("replay module wired in main.rs",
-                          "pub mod replay;" in main_src,
-                          "main.rs contains pub mod replay"))
+    
+    lib_src = _read(ROOT / "crates" / "franken-node" / "src" / "lib.rs")
+    results.append(_check("replay module wired in lib.rs",
+                          "pub mod replay;" in lib_src,
+                          "lib.rs contains pub mod replay"))
+    
     results.append(_check("spec contract exists", SPEC.exists(), _safe_rel(SPEC)))
     results.append(_check("test suite exists", TEST_SUITE.exists(), _safe_rel(TEST_SUITE)))
     results.append(_check("verification evidence exists", EVIDENCE.exists(), _safe_rel(EVIDENCE)))
